headline: University Endowment Funds Total Only RM3.8 Billion Across 20 Institutions
context: Combined endowments of all 20 public universities equal less than a single mid-tier US university's fund.

cards.big: 20 public universities hold combined endowments of RM3.8 billion in 2025
cards.sub: University of Melbourne alone holds RM12 billion more than all Malaysian universities combined

cards.big: UM's endowment of RM1.2 billion is the largest but generates only RM48 million annually
cards.sub: Conservative investment mandates limit returns to 4% well below global university norms

cards.big: Tax incentives for education donations were reduced in Budget 2024 discouraging alumni giving
cards.sub: Corporate and individual donation rates to universities declined 15% since 2023

cards.big: NUS Singapore's endowment of RM22 billion funds 35% of its annual operating budget
cards.sub: Strong endowments provide financial independence from government budget fluctuations

cards.big: Universities dependent entirely on government funding are vulnerable to every budget cycle
Should Malaysia restore enhanced tax deductions for university endowment donations
